site.title: Krynet.ai — 2030 Preview
site.description: Sweden-based, ultra-private, lightweight, and efficient instant messaging, VOIP, and online communication platform. Mixed-source software, built for users who demand unmatched privacy and security.

header.title: Krynet.ai
header.intro: Secure, private, and fast. Krynet.ai is the next-generation platform for instant messaging, voice, group chats, and online communication. Lightweight and efficient, built for people who value privacy above all. Mixed-source innovation at its core — open where it matters, proprietary where necessary.

ceo.name: Johnny
ceo.title: CEO
ceo.bio: Leading Krynet.ai to set new standards in privacy, security, and communication.

highlights: End-to-end encryption for messaging, voice, and group chats
No SMS. WebAuthn and Passkeys built in for seamless login
Mixed-source innovation: open where it matters, proprietary where needed
Supports multiple payment options, including Monero (XMR) and Bitcoin (BTC)
Hardened against metadata harvesting and traffic analysis
Partners with international privacy organizations like the EFF

features.title: Core Krynet.ai App — Proprietary License
features.description: Security-hardened core and backend logic are proprietary to prevent exploitation and maintain integrity.

features.title: Frontend Tools & Plugins — GPL 3.0
features.description: User-facing components and community plugins are fully open source to ensure transparency.

features.title: LibreJS & FSDG Compliance
features.description: Fully compatible with LibreJS, ensuring only freedom-respecting code executes in your browser.

sections.title: Voluntary Impact
sections.note: Krynet operates these programs voluntarily to build a better future, not for PR or tax avoidance.

footer.text: Krynet.ai © 2030 — Swedish-based, ultra-private, lightweight platform. Hosted on privacy-first infrastructure. All rights reserved. Zero logs, zero backdoors.
